title: Review: nie Phase 1 pre-merge
notes:
Maintainer risk: HIGH — Three P0 correctness bugs: (1) admin diverges after reconnect under concurrent joins, (2) MLS Commit+Welcome non-atomic, (3) history will silently corrupt all messages when MLS lands. The first two are Phase-1-visible under real use; the third is a Phase-2 time bomb baked into the current schema.
Confidence: 25% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: MLS state machine edge cases not exercised by current tests (malformed Welcome, epoch skip, concurrent add+remove), and the relay's concurrent DashMap + async send interaction under high load. Would raise confidence if: negative MLS tests exist (bad Welcome, wrong epoch, remove self), and if the admin election race is addressed before merging.
